text.title: Design Review Facilitation — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the meeting record + recap email shape. Facilitator, scribe, or supporting agent must satisfy these contracts.

forbidden.pattern: any artifact with outcome=decision but missing owner OR date
any artifact with outcome="iterate" / "discuss later" / "let's see" — not a valid outcome enum value (r3)
scribe == facilitator (one person cannot do both reliably)
feedback_tags has only "looks great" / vague comments without retag — meeting did not enforce r2

allowed-transformations.transformation: Combine sequential clarifying-questions about the same element into one bundled clarification.
Move an artifact to next week if its time-box overflows and the discussion is healthy (vs. cutting off prematurely).
Skip the structured-feedback round-robin for trivial artifacts (e.g., copy-only changes) — log explicit "trivial, decision: ship" in 1 min.

list.item: Decisions section: artifact + decision + owner + date
Defer section: artifact + follow-up trigger + named decider
Action items section: action + owner + date
Every artifact has outcome decision / defer / kill with owner + date (r3)
Scribe and facilitator are different people (f5)
Recap drafted, ready to send within 24h (r5)
